title: Just Beers [Just Additions Series]
body:
# ✨ Features
This mod adds many beers to drink with friends!

Use the Keg to craft your favorite beer!
Craft a Keg and some mugs and mix some ingridients in the crafting table and you are ready to use the Keg!

And now put your compound and a mug in the Keg to craft a beer!

![Display ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c401f606f0ee17f7217c228ef93b49915bb5acb.png)
